title: Cactus barlowii
taxonomy: Cactus barlowii is a species of cactus that belongs to the genus Mammillaria. It is a member of the family Cactaceae and the order Caryophyllales. The species is a type of mammillated cactus, characterized by its globular shape and short, stout spines. Cactus barlowii is native to Mexico and is often found in arid, rocky areas. It is a relatively rare and lesser-known species among cacti enthusiasts.
